queries.question: Show a list of all arrival halls and also provide a list of baggage reclaims with a maximum capacity of 500.
queries.sql:
SELECT arrival_hall.Arrival_Hall as name
FROM arrival_hall
UNION
SELECT baggage_reclaim.Baggage_Reclaim as name
FROM baggage_reclaim
WHERE baggage_reclaim.Maximum_Capacity = 500

queries.question: Which arrival halls have a maximum capacity of 500 and which baggage reclaims have the same capacity?
queries.sql:
SELECT arrival_hall.Arrival_Hall as name
FROM arrival_hall
WHERE arrival_hall.Maximum_Capacity = 500
UNION
SELECT baggage_reclaim.Baggage_Reclaim as name
FROM baggage_reclaim
WHERE baggage_reclaim.Maximum_Capacity = 500

ambiguous_dsl.question: List arrival halls and baggage reclaims with a maximum capacity of 500.
